vocabulary.name: Extensis Portfolio API Vocabulary
vocabulary.description: Domain terms used in the Extensis Portfolio REST API for digital asset management.

terms.definition: A named container within Portfolio Server that organizes and stores digital assets.
A digital file (image, video, document, font, etc.) stored and managed within a Portfolio catalog.
Descriptive information attached to an asset, such as keywords, creator, dates, dimensions, and custom fields.
A unique string identifier referencing a specific Portfolio catalog.
A unique string identifier referencing a specific digital asset within a catalog.
Digital Asset Management — the practice of organizing, storing, and distributing digital media files.
Extensis Portfolio is a digital asset management product that provides catalog-based storage and REST API access to assets.
A query operation that filters assets within a catalog by keyword, metadata field values, or date ranges.
An authentication token passed in the Authorization HTTP header to authenticate API requests.
